'''Alliance Space Stations''' were [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Characteristics==
Each station had its own factory within, allowing it to deploy new reinforcements onto the battlefield.
Alliance Space Stations were designed to be highly modular, while being somewhat vulnerable to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Broadside-class cruiser kdb-1|Broadside cruisers]].

They were capable of being upgraded with extra weaponry and production facilities. High level upgraded stations were powerful enough to of affect the tide of battle. These stations were a standardized design and in early stages were extremely vulnerable to Imperial assault, it was also common for these space stations to be assisted by a planet based [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]]. These space stations were commonly seen at the [[Mon Calamari Orbital Shipyards]] and in battle these stations were reinforced by [[CR90 corvette/Legends|Corellian Corvette]]s, [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B Frigates]] and its complement of X-Wings and Y-Wings.

These stations were the Rebel equivalent of the [[Cardan-class space station|''Cardan''-class space station]].
